name: Umar gra-Khar
bio:
Physical Appearance: Orsimer (Orc) female vampire displaying the physical traits associated with vampirism.

Race: Orsimer

Personality Keywords: devoted, corrupted

Role: Vampire and former worshipper of Azura; member of the Afflicted Brethren in Gutted Mine.

Home Location Information: Resides within Gutted Mine alongside the other members of the Afflicted Brethren.

Equipment and Abilities: Engages in close combat consistent with crusader training, combining martial ability with faith-based discipline. Displays the supernatural strength, resilience, and aggression typical of vampires.

Personality – Afflicted Worshipper: Umar gra-Khar was once a follower of Azura and became afflicted with vampirism after taking part in the slaying of a powerful vampire named Dratik. She remains within Gutted Mine with the other Afflicted Brethren, bound together by their shared origin and condition. One member of the group carries a worn, faded note that preserves the identities of the Brethren.

Fate: Umar gra-Khar is one of the Afflicted Brethren whom Azura seeks to have released from their curse during her intervention at Gutted Mine.
author: Bethesda
